caveats: Small controlled probe over saved disagreement cases.
Peer messages come from prior multi-agent round-0 outputs; majority and authority conditions reuse one wrong answer as a controlled social cue.
The no-peer baseline is regenerated by this script and may differ from the original multi-agent round-0 answer because the prompt surface differs.
No explicit anti-conformity warning is included in the revision prompt.
command: python scripts/run_peer_exposure_probe.py --run-id 20260614-2105-a8002-peer-exposure-natural-warning --out-dir /data/xuhaoming/yfy/research_workspace/experiments/20260614-2105-a8002-peer-exposure-natural-warning --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8024/v1 --model qwen2.5-7b-peer-exposure --source-format dar_gsm8k --history-jsonl /data/xuhaoming/yfy/research_workspace/results/dar-trace-filtercritical-gsm8k100-fullhistory-20260613_1730/out/history/gsm8k_100__qwen2.5-7b_N=3_R=1_P=True_V=True_K=None_M=filter_critical_S=42.jsonl --gsm8k-jsonl /data/xuhaoming/yfy/research_workspace/baselines/MAD-MM/processed_data/gsm8k/gsm8k_test.jsonl --peer-warning natural --max-cases 6 --conditions no_peer correct_answer_only wrong_answer_only wrong_majority authority_wrong wrong_rationale correct_rationale --response-mode answer --machine A800_2 --gpu-ids 1 --server-log /data/xuhaoming/yfy/research_workspace/logs/peer-exposure-followups-vllm-20260614_2100.log
